---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new model adapter, calibration metric, or sovereign routing policy for OMI.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

## Core Value Alignment
According to **OMI V11 Guidelines**, every new feature must improve at least one of the following. Please mark which ones apply:
- [ ] **Adoption** (Helps acquire more users/projects)
- [ ] **Evidence** (Improves visibility of reliability metrics, charts, or Evals)
- [ ] **Trust** (Improves RBAC, auditability, or sovereign compliance)
- [ ] **Defensibility** (Strengthens the telemetry data moat)

## Proposed Feature
Describe the feature or enhancement you would like to add.

## Problem Statement
Explain what limitation or challenge in the current system this feature addresses.

## Technical Design / Proposed Solution
If applicable, outline how you plan to implement this (e.g., changes to `api/`, `infra/`, or a new adapter in `services/`).

## Verification Plan
Explain how this enhancement will be mathematically or statistically validated (e.g., benchmark suite, unit tests).
